name: United Club℠ Card

welcome_offer.description: 100,000 bonus miles + 3,000 PQP after $5,000 in 3 months + 10,000 miles for adding authorized user in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 5X miles on United airline tickets purchased directly from United (4 bonus miles on top of 1 base mile)
5X miles on seat upgrades, Economy Plus, inflight food/beverages/Wi-Fi, and baggage fees purchased from United
5X miles on United Card Events from Chase
5X miles on prepaid hotel bookings through Renowned Hotels and Resorts for United Cardmembers via Chase Travel
2X miles at restaurants including takeout and eligible delivery services
2X miles on travel purchases excluding United

annual_credits.name: United Club Membership
annual_credits.description: Included United Club membership (~$750 value per year) — unlimited access for cardmember + 2 guests or immediate family

annual_credits.name: Annual Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $200 annual credit for United travel purchases (incidental credit)

annual_credits.name: Better Together Bonus
annual_credits.description: 5,000-mile bonus each year when you also hold a United Business Card

lounge_access.name: United Club
lounge_access.notes: Primary cardmember and guests (up to 2 adults + children) get access to all United Club locations worldwide

other_benefits.name: Premier Access
other_benefits.description: Priority check-in, security screening, boarding, and baggage handling privileges where available

other_benefits.name: Free Checked Bags
other_benefits.description: First and second checked bags free for cardmember and one companion on United-operated flights (terms apply)

other_benefits.name: Award Flight Discount
other_benefits.description: Up to 20,000-mile award flight discount annually when booking with miles; Premier members earn more

other_benefits.name: PQP Earning
other_benefits.description: Up to 10,000 PQP per year earned through card spend (1 PQP per $15 spent in certain categories), up to 28,000 PQP calendar year max

sources.notes: Official Chase page (also marketed as United Club℠ Infinite Card)

notes: AF increased from $525 to $695 in March 2025. The United Club℠ Card is also referred to as the United Club℠ Infinite Card. Offers over $2,000 in total annual value per Chase (Club membership ~$750 + credits). Competes with Amex Platinum for frequent United travelers. Note: also in 248 list as 'united-club-infinite-card' which appears to be the same product with different naming.
